meta.description: Core design tokens for Positives UI. Always source from CSS custom properties — these values are synced from globals.css. The brand feels premium, calm, spacious, and mobile-first. Primary is teal (#2EC4B6), secondary is sky-blue (#44A8D8). Dark surfaces use near-black (#0A0A0A / #111215). Avoid warm earth tones or blue-heavy palettes — those are from a previous brand iteration.

accent.note: Amber accent — use sparingly for highlights and badges

surface_dark.note: Near-black — used for dark section bg and player bg

brand_gradient.note: Primary CTA buttons, active chips, gradient accents

brand_gradient_soft.note: Subtle background tints on hero sections

font_family_headings.note: Loaded via next/font as --font-montserrat, then referenced via --font-heading

font_family_body.note: Loaded via next/font as --font-poppins, then referenced via --font-sans

radii.note: Positives uses generously rounded corners — closer to pill/card shapes than sharp squares.

glow.note: Used on btn-primary — subtle teal glow

utility_classes.note: These global CSS classes are defined in globals.css. Use them instead of repeating inline styles.

layout.member_container: Max-width 72rem responsive container for member pages (px-5 mobile, px-8 desktop)
layout.member_shell: Full-height member area wrapper with CSS vars for player/tabbar height
layout.member_shell__content: Content area — auto-adds bottom padding for sticky player + tabbar
layout.member_hero: Page header hero bg (radial teal/blue gradient on white)

surfaces.surface_card: Standard card: bg-card, border, radius-lg, shadow-soft
surfaces.surface_card--editorial: Radial teal tint overlay on white — used for content preview cards
surfaces.surface_card--dark: Dark bg with dual teal+blue radial gradients — used on coaching/premium sections

buttons.btn-primary: Pill, brand-gradient fill, shadow-glow — primary CTA
buttons.btn-secondary: Pill, white/8% fill, white border — dark-surface secondary action
buttons.btn-outline: Pill, transparent, border — light-surface secondary action

forms.member-input: Member-facing input: radius, 1.5px border, focus teal ring
forms.search-field: Icon + input combo with teal focus ring

components.filter-chip: Pill filter toggle; gradient + glow when active
components.stat-card: KPI card: Montserrat value, uppercase label
components.prose-positives: Scoped react-markdown renderer for member content cards
